danger_signals.visual_form: Character sprite animation change, distinct punch/kick startup frames
danger_signals.meaning: Imminent damage incoming; player must dodge, duck, or block

danger_signals.signal: Little Mac color shift to pink/exhaustion palette
danger_signals.visual_form: Mac's sprite changes to desaturated pink shades
danger_signals.meaning: Health/stamina critically depleted; cannot attack, vulnerability state

danger_signals.visual_form: Heart meter at bottom of screen decreases; last hearts flash or empty
danger_signals.meaning: Stamina critical; one more blocked punch or opponent hit ends exhaustion state

danger_signals.visual_form: Mac falls to canvas; 10-second countdown timer appears
danger_signals.meaning: Severe danger; failure to rise within time results in KO loss

danger_signals.visual_form: Visual indicator or announcer callout (TKO state)
danger_signals.meaning: Technical knockout triggered; automatic round/bout loss

safety_signals.visual_form: Star symbol appears above/near Mac; opponent knocked back or stunned
safety_signals.meaning: Player executed correct read; earned power resource (star for uppercut)

safety_signals.visual_form: Sprite returns to standard skin tone and clothing colors
safety_signals.meaning: Stamina recovered; return to attack capability

safety_signals.visual_form: Heart meter refills during successful dodge sequences
safety_signals.meaning: Stamina regenerating; safety window active while avoiding opponent

safety_signals.visual_form: Opponent sprite shows dizziness effect, reduced movement, or vulnerable stance
safety_signals.meaning: Opening created; safe window for aggressive punching

safety_signals.visual_form: Screen transition, corner man animations, round counter advances
safety_signals.meaning: Temporary safety; no damage possible during transition

faction_indicators.color_identity: Flesh tone, red boxing gloves, generic/minimal outfit
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Center-left positioned on screen, smaller sprite than opponents

faction_indicators.color_identity: Highly varied per opponent (Glass Joe blue/white, Bald Bull red/brown, Great Tiger orange/purple, etc.)
faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Distinct national/cultural costume and styling; themed ring entrance music
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Opponents reappear in World Circuit with new color schemes and attack patterns, signaling evolved threat level
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Ring center-right position; larger sprite scale; unique background music; championship-tier opponents have more elaborate sprites

faction_indicators.color_identity: Distinct from Minor/Major/World circuit opponents; iconic real-world or dream champion appearance
faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Title of 'Dream Fight' opponent; world heavyweight champion status
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Appears only after completing all three circuits; represents ultimate tier of threat

faction_indicators.color_identity: Red cap, blue overalls (iconic Mario design)
faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Presence signals bout legitimacy and WVBA authority
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Appears at top-center of screen; announces round starts and victories

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Opponents have simple sprite designs, basic color differentiation, minimal animation frames
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Opponents execute predictable, repeating attack patterns; easily memorized counters; lower aggression frequency

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Opponent sprites show more color detail, slightly more elaborate costumes
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Attack patterns become more complex; opponents execute multi-hit combinations; star-earning opportunities increase

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Opponents reappear with new color palettes, enhanced sprite detail, more animated entrance sequences
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Completely new attack strategies required; opponents use previously-unseen moves; higher damage-per-hit; Mac faces same opponent twice with different strategies

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Opponent sprite significantly larger or more detailed; championship-level animation quality
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Most complex patterns; minimal predictability windows; loss in championship bout results in ranking drops

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Mike Tyson/Mr. Dream sprite distinct from all circuit opponents; iconic champion appearance
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Unpredictable or extremely demanding pattern recognition; defeat ends game; victory signifies campaign completion

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Same opponent sprite as before, no visual differentiation
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Opponent retains same attack patterns; player has opportunity to implement learned counters; loss results in ranking penalty

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Little Mac sprite color palette shifts to pink/desaturated shades; visual desaturation communicates depleted state
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player cannot attack; must focus entirely on defensive dodging to regain stamina; stamina regenerates only through successful defense

environmental_storytelling.example: Glass Joe wears French flag colors and tricolor elements; entrance music is 'La Marseillaise'; visual design communicates French boxing identity

environmental_storytelling.technique: Ring entrance music as cultural identifier
environmental_storytelling.example: Piston Honda uses Japanese folk song 'Sakura'; Von Kaiser and Super Macho Man use Wagner's 'Ride of the Valkyries'; music communicates opponent origin and fighting tradition without dialogue

environmental_storytelling.technique: Sprite scale and detail as progression marker
environmental_storytelling.example: Opponents in later circuits have more animation frames and sprite detail, visually communicating increased threat level through graphical investment

environmental_storytelling.technique: Attack animation variation as pattern communication
environmental_storytelling.example: Each opponent has distinct attack startup frames; player learns visual tells (specific animation frame = specific incoming attack); visual language replaces verbal cues
Same sprite template used for multiple opponents with color and head changes; reappearing opponents in World Circuit use different color palettes to signal they are 'evolved' versions of earlier foes

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Standard skin color palette; can punch (jab, body blow); can dodge left/right, duck, guard; moves at normal speed
Sprite color shifts to pink shades; cannot punch at all; can only dodge, duck, guard; movement slowed; must avoid all incoming attacks to regenerate stamina
Falls to canvas; 10-second countdown appears; player must press button to rise; taking a 4th knockdown in bout = automatic KO loss
Star icon(s) visible above Mac; uppercut attack becomes available; stars lost upon being hit or knocked down
Distinct animation startup unique to opponent; visual tells player which attack is incoming; correct counter-punch earns Mac a star
Sprite shows dizziness animation or vulnerable stance; opponent cannot attack; represents safe window for Mac to strike
Falls to canvas; 10-second countdown; opponent must rise or lose bout; three knockdowns in one round = TKO automatic loss for opponent
Specific animation windup; warns player of incoming powerful attack; successful counter results in instant knockdown

notes: Punch-Out!! uses minimal UI and heavy reliance on visual/behavioral pattern recognition. The game communicates danger and world-state entirely through sprite animation, color palette shifts, and opponent behavior tells. No dialogue or text explains strategies; players learn by observation. The franchise's progression (Minor > Major > World > Dream) is communicated purely through visual complexity increase and sprite reuse with modifications. The game is a pure 'read the visual tell' combat system where correct prediction of opponent attack animations is the core mechanic. Political/faction identity is communicated through costume, music, and visual styling rather than narrative or UI.
